note: Generated by scripts/build-cards.mjs from apps/*/lab.card.json. Do not edit by hand.

cards.title: Background shade from a cover
cards.intent: A background that derives a balanced color scale from an image, so the page takes its tone from the content.
cards.move: extract a dominant hue, build a perceptual ramp in OKLCH, expose it as design tokens

cards.title: Motion tokens
cards.intent: Motion treated as tokens, the same as color or spacing, so easing and timing stay consistent and portable.
cards.move: easing, duration and delay captured as named tokens, previewed live; brand variants on top are a bonus

cards.title: Theme-aware dithering
cards.intent: A photo rebuilt as ordered dots that recolor with the active theme.
cards.move: 4×4 Bayer ordered dither on an offscreen canvas, recomputed on resize

cards.title: WebGL warp carousel
cards.intent: A carousel that bends and blurs its cards in a shader as they move.
cards.move: OGL shaders for warp, progressive blur and chromatic aberration, fed by DOM rasterization

cards.title: CNDS npm consumer
cards.intent: A reference app that builds UI only from published design-system npm packages, for agent-driven design and dev workflows.
cards.move: npm install @createnew/tokens and @createnew/ui-react, compose templates and components with agent guardrails

cards.title: Framer token sync
cards.intent: Pull design tokens into Framer and create variables from them.
cards.move: a Framer plugin that maps a token file onto Framer variable collections

cards.title: Token sync, Figma to Git
cards.intent: Two-way sync between Figma variables and a token repo, with a diff before anything lands.
cards.move: three-way diff across repo, Figma and conflicts; pushes edits back as a pull request
